name: Contact-center AI value research
description: The research and evidence base behind the ABL / Kore.ai contact-center value model.
discovery_queries: Gartner contact center agentic AI automation rate cost per resolution latest
McKinsey generative AI customer care productivity contact deflection latest
Forrester Total Economic Impact conversational AI customer service ROI payback latest

_notes: To research a different subject with the same engine, fork this file: set name/description, the sanctioned source list the verifier will trust, the freshness window (days) before a claim is marked stale, and the discovery queries the engine runs each cycle to find new sources.
